message:
⚡ Memoize StockMarketTicker mock data + fix cascading re-renders (#10671) (#10672)

Wrap generateMockStockData() with useMemo keyed on symbolsKey to avoid
expensive sparkline generation on every render. Optimize setSavedStocks
updater to return previous reference when no prices changed, preventing
cascading re-renders.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
